entity.label: Zadok
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: “The scribe” set over the treasuries of the temple by Nehemiah along with a priest and a Levite (Neh. 13:13).

nodes.label: Zadok
nodes.description: “The scribe” set over the treasuries of the temple by Nehemiah along with a priest and a Levite (Neh. 13:13).

verses.text: And I made treasurers over the treasuries, Shelemiah the priest, and Zadok the scribe, and of the Levites, Pedaiah: and next to them was Hanan the son of Zaccur, the son of Mattaniah: for they were counted faithful, and their office was to distribute unto their brethren.
